originalBehavior: The opening scene renders a face image as both a grayscale matrix and a magnified pixel grid, with a shared cursor highlighting the selected pixel in every view.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published MainCtrl image load plus the image-as-matrix directive, including the synchronized enlarged views and hover-selected pixel state.
notes: The vendored intro image now loads from ./resources/lxe.jpg for subpath-safe hosting.
The public route only adds horizontal-scroll wrappers on narrow screens.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still loads a local face image and renders the image-as-matrix custom element first.
Smoke coverage waits for the intro canvas and checks the shared selected-pixel state updates.

originalBehavior: The preset selector updates the named kernel, the displayed 3x3 matrix values, and the downstream filtered output together.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published selectedKernel watcher, preset lists, and kernel-matrix directive so the visible matrix stays synchronized with the active preset.
notes: The first selector still excludes the custom kernel, matching the published selectableKernels split.
No additional presets were added locally.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still renders a preset select above kernel-matrix.
Smoke coverage changes the selected preset locally and checks the scope kernel values and visible matrix text respond.

originalBehavior: The inspector scene updates the highlighted 3x3 neighborhood, kernel arithmetic, and output pixel preview as readers hover over the input or output image.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published kernel-inspect directive, including shared hover state, arithmetic labels, and the output block readout.
notes: The inspector still uses the shared d1SelPixel state from MainCtrl.
The duplicate preset selector inside the inspector is preserved.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still places a kernel-inspect surface between the preset matrix and the playground.
Smoke coverage hovers the local inspector and checks the selected-pixel state plus arithmetic output change.

originalBehavior: The inspector treats out-of-bounds neighbors as black along the image edges, showing question marks in the arithmetic panel and visibly different border output.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published boundary behavior, including black edge fill, missing-neighbor placeholders, and zeroed outer pixels in the filtered image data.
notes: This behavior is part of the original teaching surface, not a local hosting fix.
The docs call it out because the border rule is easy to miss when porting the demo.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still explains the edge-handling rule directly in the article copy.
Smoke coverage moves the local inspector to a border pixel and checks the arithmetic panel shows missing-neighbor placeholders.

originalBehavior: The playground updates the output image when readers switch presets, edit kernel cells, upload an image, or use live video when supported.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published kernel-playground directive, custom-kernel editor, upload input, and optional live-video button, with one local path repair for the default image.
notes: The default playground image now loads from ./resources/library.jpg for subpath-safe hosting.
EXIF is vendored locally so orientation handling keeps working for uploaded images.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still includes the editable 3x3 grid, preset selector, file input, and conditional live-video path.
Smoke coverage edits a local kernel cell and checks the selectedKernel flips to custom and the rendered output changes.

originalBehavior: The published page included EV branding, creator links, share widgets, newsletter prompts, analytics, and comments around the explainer.
localStatus: The local route removes those public-shell surfaces and uses the shared footer as the only original-page reference link.
notes: Technical provenance stays in docs only.
The public menu now routes back to the local replica index.
evidence: Public-surface auditing blocks creator promo, EV branding, share widgets, newsletter embeds, analytics, and comments from shipping routes.
The local page keeps a single shared-footer reference link to the live original.
